page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 40 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 9.6 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

In benchmark testing, the x86_64 architecture with AVX-512 support delivers stable performance. The single-core stress-ng score is 1436.39, while the multi-core score reaches 38318.39. Memory performance is highlighted by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 2128.36 GB/sec and a large block uncached write bandwidth of 49.57 GB/sec. For database operations, the instance achieves a PassMark database score of 14328.81 and processes 32.74 million Redis SET operations per second.

Due to the lack of local storage, this instance relies entirely on network-attached storage, which may impact workloads requiring ultra-low latency local disk I/O. However, the high memory capacity and dedicated CPU allocation make it highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive enterprise applications. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 40 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. Equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.6 GB, making it highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark results show strong memory performance, with a cached read-only bandwidth of 2128.36 GB/sec and 32.74 million Redis SET operations per second. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring high memory density without local storage dependencies.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large databases and in-memory caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge features 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 384 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring forty dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high-density RAM for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz
384.0 GB of RAM providing 9.6 GB per core for memory-heavy tasks
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the default configuration
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications
